heading: Training funds
label: 574a Training funds
notes: “Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of Pub. L. 110–114section 2201 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary may include individuals not employed by the Department of the Army in training classes and courses offered by the Corps of Engineers in any case in which the Secretary determines that it is in the best interest of the Federal Government to include those individuals as participants.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: An individual not employed by the Department of the Army attending a training class or course described in subsection (a) shall pay the full cost of the training provided to the individual.

children.label: A
children.text: may be retained by the Secretary;

children.label: B
children.text: shall be credited to an appropriations account used for paying training costs; and

children.label: C
children.text: shall be available for use by the Secretary, without further appropriation, for training purposes.

children.heading: Excess amounts
children.label: 3 Excess amounts
children.text: Any payments received under paragraph (2) that are in excess of the actual cost of training provided shall be credited as miscellaneous receipts to the Treasury of the United States.
